meta.listDescription: View and manage your consultation sessions.

list.heading: My Sessions
list.emptyNote: Start with guided matching or book a session with a practitioner, and it will appear here.

runtimeHints.DRAFT: This session is still being prepared.
runtimeHints.PENDING_PAYMENT: Payment is still needed to keep this session.
runtimeHints.CONFIRMED: This session is confirmed. Session access opens closer to the scheduled time.
runtimeHints.UPCOMING: This session is coming up. Session access opens shortly before it starts.
runtimeHints.READY_TO_JOIN: Session access should be ready now.
runtimeHints.CANCELLED: This session is no longer active.
runtimeHints.EXPIRED: The payment window ended before this session was confirmed.
runtimeHints.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is in progress for this session.

detail.heading: Session Details

PENDING_PAYMENT.note: Your session is booked and waiting for payment. Complete payment to confirm your slot.

PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE.note: Your session request has been sent. Waiting for practitioner confirmation.

UPCOMING.note: Your session is confirmed and coming up soon.

READY_TO_JOIN.note: Your session is about to begin. Your practitioner will share the meeting details with you.

IN_PROGRESS.note: Your session is currently in progress.

EXPIRED.note: The payment window for this session has passed. Please book a new slot.

NO_SHOW.note: This session was marked as no-show.

REFUND_PENDING.note: A refund for this session is being processed.

runtime.heading: Session access
runtime.ready: Your session room is ready. Open it when you are ready to continue.
runtime.prepared: Your session room is prepared. Session entry will open closer to the scheduled start.
runtime.error: Could not check session access right now. Please try again.
runtime.prepareError: Could not prepare the session room right now. Please try again shortly.

blocked.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: This session cannot be joined in its current status.
blocked.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: Live session access is only available for video sessions.
blocked.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: Session access is not open yet. Try again closer to the scheduled time.
blocked.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: The session room is still being prepared. Please try again in a moment.

status.DRAFT: This session is still being prepared.
status.PENDING_PAYMENT: Complete payment first so your session can move forward.
status.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: Your request is waiting for practitioner confirmation before session access becomes available.
status.CONFIRMED: Your slot is confirmed. We will open session access closer to the appointment time.
status.UPCOMING: Your session is approaching. Check access shortly before the scheduled start.
status.READY_TO_JOIN: Your session should be ready to enter now.
status.CANCELLED: This cancelled session no longer has live access.
status.NO_SHOW: This session was marked as missed.
status.EXPIRED: This expired session no longer has live access.
status.REFUND_PENDING: This session is no longer active while the refund is being processed.
status.REFUNDED: This refunded session no longer has live access.

awaitingWindow.title: Session entry is not open yet
awaitingWindow.note: Your session is on track. You will be able to enter closer to the scheduled start time.

readyToPrepare.title: You can prepare the session room now
readyToPrepare.note: Preparing the room early helps the live session feel smoother once entry opens.

preparedWaiting.title: The session room is prepared
preparedWaiting.note: Everything is set on our side. You can return here when the entry window opens.

readyToJoin.title: You can enter the live session now
readyToJoin.note: Open the session room when you are ready. It will launch in a secure external room.

liveNow.title: Your session is in its live phase
liveNow.note: If you get disconnected, return here and reopen the room.

unavailable.title: Live session access is not available
unavailable.note: This session is outside the active live flow right now.

facts.roomPending: Room details will appear here when the runtime is prepared.

notes.prepareWindow: Room preparation is available up to 24 hours before the session and remains available until the live window closes.
notes.joinWindow: Session entry opens 15 minutes before the scheduled start and stays available for a limited time after the session ends.
notes.returnToSession: You can come back to this page any time if you need to reopen the live room.
notes.openInNewTab: The live session opens in a separate room so you can return here if you need the session details again.

cancelConfirm.heading: Cancel this session?
cancelConfirm.note: This action cannot be undone. Your slot will be released.

detail.cancelError: Could not cancel this session. Please try again.

list.heading: My Sessions
list.emptyNote: Sessions with your patients will appear here once they are booked and confirmed.

runtimeHints.DRAFT: This session is still being prepared.
runtimeHints.PENDING_PAYMENT: Waiting for the patient to complete payment.
runtimeHints.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: This request is waiting for your response.
runtimeHints.CONFIRMED: This session is confirmed. No runtime action is needed yet.
runtimeHints.UPCOMING: This session is approaching. Prepare the room when the runtime window opens.
runtimeHints.READY_TO_JOIN: The live room should be available now. Open the session and close it out after it ends.
runtimeHints.IN_PROGRESS: This session is live now. Reopen the room here if needed, then close the session when it ends.
runtimeHints.COMPLETED: This session was closed as completed.
runtimeHints.CANCELLED: This session is no longer active.
runtimeHints.NO_SHOW: This session was closed as no-show.
runtimeHints.EXPIRED: This session expired before payment was completed.
runtimeHints.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is being processed for this session.

actions.heading: Session actions
actions.note: Close the session only when the current lifecycle state allows it.

availability.available: The session lifecycle currently allows you to record the closing outcome.
availability.awaitingPayment: Session closing is not available while the patient still needs to complete payment.
availability.awaitingPractitionerResponse: Respond to the request first. Session closing is not available yet.
availability.notOpenYet: Session closing becomes available closer to the live session and after active handling begins.
availability.completed: This session has already been closed as completed.
availability.noShow: This session has already been closed as no-show.
availability.cancelled: This cancelled session does not have practitioner closing actions.
availability.expired: This expired session does not have practitioner closing actions.
availability.refundPending: This session is already outside the active lifecycle while the refund is being processed.
availability.refunded: This refunded session does not have practitioner closing actions.
availability.notAvailable: No practitioner closing action is available for this session right now.

actions.completeSuccess: This session was marked as completed.
actions.noShowSuccess: This session was marked as no-show.
actions.error: Could not update this session. Please try again.

completeConfirm.heading: Mark this session as completed?
completeConfirm.note: Use this after the consultation has finished successfully.

noShowConfirm.heading: Mark this session as no-show?
noShowConfirm.note: Use this only if the patient did not attend the scheduled session.

PENDING_PAYMENT.note: This session is awaiting payment from the patient.

PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE.note: This session request is awaiting your response.

UPCOMING.note: This session is confirmed and coming up soon. Be ready at the scheduled time.

READY_TO_JOIN.note: This session is about to begin.

IN_PROGRESS.note: This session is currently in progress.

EXPIRED.note: This session expired before payment was completed.

NO_SHOW.note: This session was marked as no-show.

REFUND_PENDING.note: A refund for this session is being processed.

runtime.heading: Session access
runtime.ready: The session room is ready. Open it when you are ready to continue.
runtime.prepared: The session room is prepared. Entry will open closer to the scheduled start.
runtime.error: Could not check session access right now. Please try again.
runtime.prepareError: Could not prepare the session room right now. Please try again shortly.

blocked.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: This session cannot be joined in its current status.
blocked.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: Live session access is only available for video sessions.
blocked.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: Session access is not open yet. Try again closer to the scheduled time.
blocked.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: The session room is still being prepared. Please try again in a moment.

status.DRAFT: This session is still being prepared.
status.PENDING_PAYMENT: The patient still needs to complete payment before session access becomes available.
status.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: Your response is still needed before this session can move forward.
status.CONFIRMED: This session is confirmed. Access opens closer to the appointment time.
status.UPCOMING: This session is approaching. Check access shortly before the scheduled start.
status.READY_TO_JOIN: This session should be ready to enter now.
status.CANCELLED: This cancelled session no longer has live access.
status.NO_SHOW: This session was marked as missed.
status.EXPIRED: This expired session no longer has live access.
status.REFUND_PENDING: This session is no longer active while the refund is being processed.
status.REFUNDED: This refunded session no longer has live access.

awaitingWindow.title: Live entry is not open yet
awaitingWindow.note: This session is on track. You will be able to enter closer to the scheduled start.

readyToPrepare.title: You can prepare the session room now
readyToPrepare.note: Preparing the room early helps the session open more smoothly when the patient is ready to join.

preparedWaiting.title: The session room is prepared
preparedWaiting.note: The room is ready on our side. Return here when the entry window opens.

readyToJoin.title: You can open the live session now
readyToJoin.note: Launch the session room when you are ready to start. It opens in a secure external room.

liveNow.title: This session is in its live phase
liveNow.note: If the room closes or disconnects, return here and reopen it.

unavailable.title: Live access is not available
unavailable.note: This session is outside the active live flow right now.

facts.roomPending: Room details will appear here when the runtime is prepared.

notes.prepareWindow: Room preparation is available up to 24 hours before the session and remains available until the live window closes.
notes.joinWindow: Session entry opens 15 minutes before the scheduled start and stays available for a limited time after the session ends.
notes.returnToSession: You can come back to this page any time if you need to reopen the live room.
notes.openInNewTab: The live session opens in a separate room so you can return here for session context and closing actions.
notes.closeoutAfterSession: Use the session closing actions below only when the live consultation has truly ended or the patient did not attend.

handlingNow.heading: What needs attention now
handlingNow.completedAt: This session was marked as completed on {datetime}.

closeout.awaitingPayment: No closing action until payment is resolved
closeout.awaitingPractitionerResponse: No closing action until the request moves forward
closeout.notOpenYet: Closing action is not available yet
closeout.cancelled: No closing action on cancelled sessions
closeout.expired: No closing action on expired sessions
closeout.refundPending: No closing action while refund is in progress

awaitingPayment.title: Waiting on payment before runtime can move forward
awaitingPayment.note: The patient still needs to complete payment. Live access and closing actions stay unavailable until the session advances.

awaitingPractitionerResponse.title: This request still needs your response
awaitingPractitionerResponse.note: The session has not moved into runtime handling yet. Once the lifecycle advances, live access and closing actions become clearer here.

confirmedWaiting.title: The session is confirmed and on track
confirmedWaiting.note: No immediate runtime action is needed yet. Return here when the session gets closer so you can prepare or open the room.

prepareSoon.title: Prepare for the live session window
prepareSoon.note: The session is close enough that runtime handling matters. Prepare the room when available so opening the live session is smoother.

readyToOpen.title: You can open the live session now
readyToOpen.note: Use the runtime controls when you are ready to start. After the consultation ends, return here to record the correct closing outcome.

liveNow.title: The session is in its active live phase
liveNow.note: Keep this page as your fallback point if you need to reopen the room. When the consultation ends, close the session as completed or no-show if needed.

completed.title: This session has already been closed
completed.note: The consultation has already been recorded as completed. No further practitioner runtime action is available here.

noShow.title: This session has already been closed as no-show
noShow.note: The no-show outcome is already recorded for this session. No further practitioner runtime action is available here.

cancelled.title: This session is no longer in an active runtime flow
cancelled.note: The session was cancelled before it reached a valid practitioner closing step.

expired.title: This session expired before live handling could continue
expired.note: The payment window ended before the session moved into a valid live workflow.

refundPending.title: The session is now in refund handling
refundPending.note: The active consultation lifecycle has already ended for this session while refund processing continues.

refunded.title: This session is closed out and refunded
refunded.note: No further practitioner runtime handling is available for this session.

inactive.title: No runtime handling is available right now
inactive.note: This session is outside the current practitioner live workflow.

instantBooking.sectionNote: These instant booking requests are waiting for your response. They expire automatically if not acted on.
instantBooking.acceptError: Could not accept this request. Please try again.
instantBooking.rejectError: Could not decline this request. Please try again.
instantBooking.acceptedNote: Request accepted. A session has been created.
